LAW AND MOTION 302, ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA NOTICE OF MOTION TO ADD JUDGMENT DEBTOR CCP 187 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. FIRST, THE MOTION CONFUSINGLY REFERS TO "KATS RESOURCES" AND "KATS RESOURCES, LTD." SECOND, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT MR. YEH ABUSED THE CORPORATE FORM, IS THE ALTER EGO OF THE ENTITIES, OR THAT HE CONTROLLED THE UNDERLYING LITIGATION. SEE TRIPLETT V. FARMER INS. EXCHANGE (1994) 24 CAL.APP.4TH 1415, 1421. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Add Judgment Debtor Ccp 187
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: RICHARD G. HYPPA, ESQ., 209.836.9288, FOR ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA.
TONY C. HOH, ESQ., 415.788.8811, FOR DEFENDANT ADAM YEH.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA Notice Of Motion To Add Judgment Debtor CCP 187 is denied without prejudice. First, the motion confusingly refers to "Kats Resources" and "Kats Resources, Ltd." Second, plaintiff fails to present sufficient evidence showing that Mr. Yeh abused the corporate form, is the alter ego of the entities, or that he controlled the underlying litigation. See Triplett v. Farmer Ins. Exchange (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1415, 1421. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn To Add Judgment Debtor Ccp 187
Off Calendar Dec-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICHARD G. HYPPA, TEL. NO. (209) 836-9288 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF ASSIGNEE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA'S Motion To Add Judgment Debtor is Granted. No opposition filed. KATS Resources Ltd. is added as a judgment debtor in this action for all sums due and payable from the original debtor, Stella Starr Inc. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Mtn To Add Judgment Debtor Ccp 187
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Continued To Dec-31-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA'S Motion To Add Judgment Debtor CCP 187 is continued to December 31, 2012, to give moving party an opportunity to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. The moving party shall provide those papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by December 14, 2012. See SF Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn For Assignment Order And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: ASSIGNEE RICHARD HYPPA'S Motion For Assignment Order is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
